Localization.Description: Possible traffic tunneling from a Unix host to a Windows host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Login to host {dst.hostname} via "{reason}" on behalf of account {subject.account.name} possibly using traffic tunneling from host {src.ip} is detected on host {event_src.host}. Login status: {status}.
Possible traffic tunneling and access to port {dst.port} from process {subject.process.name} is detected on Unix host {event_src.host}
Login to host {dst.hostname} via "{reason}" on behalf of account {subject.account.name} possibly using traffic tunneling is detected on host {event_src.host}. Login status: {status}.
